title: Internal Audit Associate
description:
Our client is a leading financial services group with a growing regional presence. They are looking to add to their Internal Audit (IA) team. This is an Associate role with the following responsibilities and requirements.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement audit programs to assess internal control systems and ensure compliance with policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
  • Perform detailed audit tests to verify adherence to prevailing policies and regulatory standards across the organization
  • Evaluate operational efficiency and effectiveness in accomplishment of objectives and goals established for various organizational and functional activities within the Group.
  • Identify critical operational and control issues and recommend actionable improvements to enhance organizational performance
  • Prepare, tabulate, and present audit findings to supervisors, ensuring clear communication of risks and recommendations
  • Follow up on agreed corrective actions from previous audits to ensure timely resolution and compliance
  • Manage regional travel commitments to conduct audits across multiple locations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • 1-4 years of relevant experience in internal audit or related fields
  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline
  • Demonstrate meticulous attention to detail in audit execution and reporting
  • Possess analytical and problem-solving skills to identify issues and develop effective solutions
  • Work independently with initiative and self-motivation while contributing effectively as a collaborative team member
  • Communicate audit findings clearly and professionally to diverse stakeholders
  • Exhibit strong interpersonal skills to foster teamwork and stakeholder engagement


We encourage interested qualified candidates to email an updated resume in word doc format to enquiry@targetpartners.com.sg indicating current and expected compensation.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

[Florence Teo, R1105626]

postedCompany.description:
TARGET PARTNERS EXECUTIVE SEARCH PTE. LTD. [09C4648]

We are a boutique executive search firm formed by a team of highly experienced consultants with in-depth sector experience.  Our core sectors are Banking and Finance, Engineering and Healthcare.  Our clients include international and local banks, asset management and private equity firms, MNCs, public listed companies, major healthcare and hospital groups.
